docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGON, ALEXANDER G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-20-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE AND GEN NASHIMOTO--PARTER/ SUPPORT ADMINISTRATOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 90.00 - SERVED MAY-03-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGON, ALEXANDER G.
